purpose: Translate the AMOS canonical product/spec artifacts into a Codex-ready engineering handoff.

project.name: AMOS / AI Market Operating System
project.engineering_goal: Build a local JSON/CSV-driven prototype app first, preserving all guardrails and no-omission requirements. Do not connect live APIs or brokerage/trading.
non_negotiable: Do not simplify AMOS into a generic stock dashboard.
Do not remove Gann Research Zone depth.
Do not remove Anchor Verification gate.
Do not allow Gann-only trade triggers.
Do not present sample/manual-ready data as live market data.
Do not drop user-specific risk protection and behavior guardrails.

recommended_stack.styling: CSS modules / Tailwind / design tokens; dark terminal style preserved
recommended_stack.charts: Lightweight local charts later; no need for real-time charting in first pass
recommended_stack.tests: Vitest/Jest for guards and data transforms
recommended_stack.export_scripts: Python scripts for Excel/CSV/HTML exports remain in tools/

app_routes.purpose: Entry point linking all modules and showing current phase/status.
Full ticker battle room with Gann, price action, evidence, risk and strategy.
Show Gann Live engines, scores, missing gates, registry metadata.
Display and edit anchor verification state later; read-only first.
Render Manual Inputs, Generated Brief, Priority, Evidence as app views.
Render exported daily brief from local JSON/CSV.
Claims, source quality, counter-evidence and action gate.
Event calendar with No Attack gates.
Position roles, migration, opportunity cost and risk alerts.

guardrail_tests_required: If dataFreshness == Missing, aggressive action is blocked.
If Gann anchor usePermission is Research Only or Do Not Use, Gann levels render as research-only.
If hardMissingData is non-empty, Gann action cap is Watch/Research Only.
If event importance is Critical, default action cap is No Attack.
If a claim has no counterEvidence, EvidencePanel action gate cannot be Can Influence Action.
If page uses sample/manual-ready data, GuardrailBanner must be visible.
first_codex_tasks: Create repo skeleton with Next.js or Vite React + TypeScript.
Implement StockIntelligencePage for five sample tickers using local JSON and generated HTML reference.
Implement DailyBriefPage from exporter output/fallback JSON.
Do not connect live APIs yet.
acceptance_criteria: App runs locally with npm install + npm run dev.
Home page clearly shows v0.3A Manual Data Alpha and sample-data guardrail.
Five sample tickers render stock pages.
Each Gann page shows Gann Live, missing gates and anchor verification link.
No component claims live data unless explicitly provided.
No-Omission Checklist is present in repo and linked from README.
All source artifacts are preserved in /artifacts or /docs, not discarded.
